title: rubus hirtus subvar. amoenus
intro: Rubus hirtus subvar. amoenus, also known as the American black raspberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and inflammation due to its high content of antioxidants and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus subvar. amoenus include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in preventing certain diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular diseases. Herbal preparations of Rubus hirtus subvar. amoenus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
